response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced and versatile software engineer with over 15 years of experience, meeting the minimum tenure. His recent work in AI-agent infrastructure is directly relevant, and his entrepreneurial spirit, shown by founding GISCollective and leading workshops, aligns with the leadership aspects of the role. However, his experience appears more focused on hands-on implementation at a Staff Engineer level rather than the high-level, director-level strategic planning required for this Principal role. His cloud and deep AI strategy experience seems limited compared to the preferred qualifications.
strengths: Extensive and diverse technical background across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded) and languages.
Demonstrates strong initiative and leadership through founding an open-source project and actively teaching/mentoring.
Recent, hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and tooling.
concerns: Lacks demonstrated experience in a director-level, strategic role defining AI or cloud vision for a large organization.
Cloud experience seems limited to specific tools (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) rather than broader platform strategy.
No formal advanced education (Master's/PhD) in AI or a long track record of recognized expertise in the field.

key_factors.factor: Mismatch in Seniority and Strategic Scope
